title: tephrosia brachycarpa
intro: Tephrosia brachycarpa, also known as horsefly pea, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It is a woody climber or shrub that is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Tephrosia brachycarpa are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and swelling, and treat various infections, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Tephrosia brachycarpa can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
